name: Carrot Slaw with Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Place carrots in a colander. Pour boiling water over them and let stand until cool enough to handle (about 5 minutes), then drain well.
2. In a bowl, whisk together chili, lime juice, and maple syrup. Add carrots, cashew pieces, and cilantro; toss to mix evenly.
3. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
